data.Name: Drogon - Plan for Development and Operation (PDO) DG2 Draft
data.Description: Draft PDO for the Drogon DG2 Concept Select gate. Covers field description (Volantis Group, 3 zones, 7 fault-bounded regions), selected development concept (FPSO, 4 producers + 2 WI wells), STOIIP ≈ 34.5 MSm³, GIIP ≈ 1.0 GSm³ (NorthHorst gas cap, GOC 1640 m). Black-oil model (DISGAS+VAPOIL), ref. pressure 310 bar. Production forecast: peak 14,259 Sm³/d oil (Oct 2018), declining to ~2,900 Sm³/d at RF ~40%. LRAT-controlled prediction with WI at 6,500 Sm³/d per well to Jan 2025. Basis for DG3 FEED scope.
